title: Better Creaking
description: Makes the creaking not suck, with buffs and some unique changes
body:
![Better Creaking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0205add78bcaf92d46359807a2b92bbf05bb65c.png)

### **I highly recommend using [Echos of the Garden](https://modrinth.com/datapack/echos-of-the-garden) in combination with this mod**

The Creaking is a very underpowered mob that is also completely avoidable in the base game. This datapack seeks to fix these 2 issues

### **Changes**
- Increased Creaking's speed and damage by a signifigant amount
- Petrification:
  - When hit by a creaking you become more petrified
  - If hit enough times you will become petrified and will be immobilized for a short time
  - Being Petrified Gives you blindness (1.3+ only)
  - A meter above your hotbar shows how petrified you are
- Night time in Pale Gardens:
  - This feature is disableable by using the commands (Enabled by Default)
    - "/function bettercreaking:disabletimewarp"
    - and "/function bettercreaking:enabletimewarp"
  - When enabled players in a pale garden and near creaking hearts won't be able to sleep through the night
  - And when in a pale garden and near a creaking heart, daytime only lasts a few seconds, while night lasts a regular amount of time
  - This change makes it very difficult to avoid running into the creaking when trying to explore a pale garden. But of course it is toggleable as I understand some people may not like this, especially in multi-player enviorments
